competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Anis Hadj Moussa (Algeria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Argentina. Lautaro Martínez is caught offside.
Offside, Argentina. Lionel Messi is caught offside.
Offside, Algeria. Farès Chaïbi is caught offside.
GOAL OVERTURNED BY VAR: Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) scores but the goal is ruled out after a VAR review.
VAR Decision: No Goal Argentina 0-0 Algeria.
Foul by Lautaro Martínez (Argentina).
Foul by Gonzalo Montiel (Argentina).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Aïssa Mandi (Algeria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

relatedPlayer.name: 亚历克西斯·麦卡利斯特

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Amine Gouiri (Algeria).
Thiago Almada (Argentina) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from more than 35 yards misses to the left from a direct free kick.
Foul by Facundo Medina (Argentina).
Offside, Argentina. Thiago Almada is caught offside.
Corner, Algeria. Conceded by Emiliano Martínez.
Attempt missed. Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) header from the centre of the box misses to the left. Assisted by Hicham Boudaoui with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 法雷斯·沙伊比射门偏出。 希查姆·布道维参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Thiago Almada (Argentina) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Enzo Fernández.

events.description: 蒂亚戈·阿尔马达射门偏出。 恩佐·费尔南德斯参与进攻。

player.name: 亚历克西斯·麦卡利斯特

qualifiers.espnText: Ibrahim Maza (Algeria) wins a free kick on the left wing.

events.description: 亚历克西斯·麦卡利斯特犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Aïssa Mandi.

events.description: 法雷斯·沙伊比射门偏出。 艾萨·曼迪参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Farès Chaïbi (Algeria) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the right is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Anis Hadj Moussa.

events.description: 法雷斯·沙伊比射门偏出。 阿尼斯·哈吉·穆萨参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Ramy Bensebaini (Algeria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Algeria. Conceded by Lisandro Martínez.
Attempt blocked. Anis Hadj Moussa (Algeria) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Rafik Belghali.

events.description: 阿尼斯·哈吉·穆萨射门被封堵。 拉菲克·贝尔加利参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Facundo Medina (Argentina) wins a free kick on the left wing.

player.name: 亚历克西斯·麦卡利斯特

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Alexis Mac Allister (Argentina) header from the centre of the box is too high. Assisted by Lionel Messi with a cross following a set piece situation.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Alexis Mac Allister Shot Off Tar

events.description: 亚历克西斯·麦卡利斯特射门偏出。 梅西参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Argentina 1, Algeria 0.

events.description: 纳韦尔·莫利纳 登场，贡萨洛·蒙蒂尔 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Second Half begins Argentina 1, Algeria 0.
Foul by Hicham Boudaoui (Algeria).
Attempt missed. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Nahuel Molina.

events.description: 梅西射门偏出。 纳韦尔·莫利纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Ibrahim Maza (Algeria) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Lautaro Martínez (Argentina) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Luca Zidane (Algeria). Assisted by Lionel Messi with a through ball.

events.description: 劳塔罗·马丁内斯射正。 梅西参与进攻。
阿尔瓦雷斯 登场，劳塔罗·马丁内斯 离场
尼科·冈萨雷斯 登场，蒂亚戈·阿尔马达 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Cristian Romero (Argentina).

events.description: 克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Ibrahim Maza (Algeria) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Farès Chaïbi.

events.description: 易卜拉欣·马扎射门被封堵。 法雷斯·沙伊比参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Argentina. Conceded by Aïssa Mandi.

player.name: 亚历克西斯·麦卡利斯特

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Alexis Mac Allister (Argentina) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Luca Zidane (Algeria).
qualifiers.espnShortText: Alexis Mac Allister Shot On Targ

events.description: 亚历克西斯·麦卡利斯特射正。

qualifiers.espnText: Enzo Fernández (Argentina) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

events.description: 侯赛姆·奥亚尔 登场，希查姆·布道维 离场
里亚德·马赫雷斯 登场，阿尼斯·哈吉·穆萨 离场
穆罕默德·阿穆拉 登场，阿明·古伊里 离场

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Mohammed Amoura (Algeria).

relatedPlayer.name: 亚历克西斯·麦卡利斯特

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Lionel Messi (Argentina) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Luca Zidane (Algeria). Assisted by Alexis Mac Allister.

events.description: 梅西射正。 亚历克西斯·麦卡利斯特参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Argentina. Conceded by Luca Zidane.
Attempt missed. Houssem Aouar (Algeria) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Mohammed Amoura.

events.description: 侯赛姆·奥亚尔射门偏出。 穆罕默德·阿穆拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Rodrigo De Paul (Argentina) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match because of an injury Ibrahim Maza (Algeria).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

events.description: 尼古拉斯·奥塔门迪 登场，克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗 离场
